mapper.select: SELECT vote_type FROM voj_discussion_reply_votes WHERE discussion_reply_id = #{discussionReplyId} AND voter_uid = #{voterUid} AND vote_type IN (1, -1)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voj_discussion_reply_votes v JOIN voj_discussion_replies r ON v.discussion_reply_id = r.discussion_reply_id WHERE r.discussion_thread_id = #{discussionThreadId} AND v.vote_type = 2
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO voj_discussion_reply_votes(discussion_reply_id, voter_uid, vote_type) VALUES (#{discussionReplyId}, #{voterUid}, #{voteType}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE vote_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM voj_discussion_reply_votes WHERE discussion_reply_id = #{discussionReplyId} AND voter_uid = #{voterUid} AND vote_type = #{voteType}
